name: Vantage Cloud Cost MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Vantage MCP server from Vantage enabling AI agents to analyze multi-cloud costs and usage — querying cost reports across AWS, Azure, and GCP, analyzing spending trends, comparing cost allocation, identifying optimization opportunities, and integrating Vantage's cloud cost intelligence platform into agent-driven FinOps and cost governance workflows.
use_cases: Querying multi-cloud cost reports from FinOps agents
Analyzing cost allocation across teams and business units from chargeback agents
Identifying cost optimization opportunities from cloud governance agents
Comparing cloud provider costs from infrastructure planning agents
Generating cost trend reports from financial reporting agents
Monitoring budget thresholds and anomalies from alerting agents
not_for: Teams using Cloudability, CloudHealth, or other dedicated FinOps tools
Teams with single-cloud focus needing native cloud cost tools (AWS Cost Explorer, etc.)
Real-time billing management or payment processing
best_when: An agent needs multi-cloud cost visibility and optimization insights from Vantage — for FinOps teams managing AWS + Azure + GCP spend across multiple business units.
avoid_when: You only use one cloud provider — native cost tools (AWS Cost Explorer, Azure Cost Management) offer deeper single-cloud analytics. Also avoid without a Vantage subscription.

auth.notes: Vantage API access token from Vantage account settings. Token-based authentication for all API calls. Read-only access available. Requires active Vantage subscription with connected cloud accounts.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Vantage Free: 1 workspace, limited cost reports
pricing.notes: Vantage has a free tier for small teams. Paid plans for larger organizations with more workspaces and features. Requires connecting cloud provider accounts to Vantage.

known_agent_gotchas: Requires cloud accounts to be connected and data ingested into Vantage first
Cost data has delay — typically 24-48 hours behind real-time
Report IDs and filter tokens are Vantage-specific — agents must discover before use
Rate limits not well-documented — implement exponential backoff
Vantage subscription required — free tier has limited features
Official Vantage MCP — well-maintained but requires familiarity with Vantage concepts (cost reports, segments, etc.)
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API token auth. SOC2, GDPR. Official Vantage MCP. Read-only access available. Protect API token as secret. Vantage accesses your cloud billing data — review data sharing agreement.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API token auth. SOC2, GDPR. Official Vantage MCP. Use read-only API token. Vantage holds billing data from your cloud accounts — review security policies.
